nasb.text: No one who may have been set apart among men shall be ransomed; he shall surely be put to death.

esv.text: No one devoted, who is to be devoted for destruction from mankind, shall be ransomed; he shall surely be put to death.

cnv.text: 如果有人永獻牲畜作永屬耶和華的聖物，就不可贖回；必須把牠殺死。

ccb.text: 凡永远献上的人不可被赎回，必须被处死。
